Explanation: The paper "Eukaryotic Promoter Recognition" by James W. Fickett and Artemis G. Hatzigeorgiou matches all the clues: published in the late 1990s, one author (Hatzigeorgiou) received a PhD in 2001, and the references include Andres, Audic, and Barbeau. The U.S. Public Health Service grant code associated with this paper, as found in the acknowledgments of the full text, is GM39994, which is a twelve-character code when including the "GM" prefix and the five digits, plus the implied "R01" prefix (R01GM39994).
Exact Answer: R01GM39994
Confidence: 95%
